PHA.guidance: Complete the electronic PHA before Drill Weekend. Email the Medical Records point of contact to request an in-person PHA with a medical provider during Drill Weekend.

Dental.guidance: Dental screening is usually handled as a walk-in process during Drill Weekend.

Cyber Awareness.guidance: Complete Cyber Awareness training on Navy eLearning before due date to maintain training compliance.

Annual Training Plan.guidance: Coordinate proposed Annual Training dates with unit leadership before submitting requests through official channels.
